nodes.name: Blue-billed malimbe
nodes.summary: The blue-billed malimbe or Gray's malimbe (Malimbus nitens) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is native to the African tropical rainforest. References External links Blue-billed malimbe species text in Weaver Watch
